body:
Thanks for the context here. I did a careful shell check against current `main`, and this is already implemented.

Close as implemented: current main and the shipped v2026.5.12 release already support ACP coding-agent integrations through the official acpx runtime plugin, `/acp` controls, and `sessions_spawn({ runtime: "acp" })`.

So I’m closing this as already implemented rather than keeping a duplicate issue open.

<details>
<summary>Review details</summary>

Best possible solution:

Keep using the shipped ACP/acpx plugin path and track any narrower ACP gaps as separate issues against the specific harness, command, or channel behavior.

Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue?

Not applicable; this is a feature request, not a bug report. The current-main and release checks verify that the requested ACP surfaces already exist.

Is this the best way to solve the issue?

Yes; the existing official acpx plugin plus `/acp` and `sessions_spawn({ runtime: "acp" })` is the maintainable plugin-boundary solution instead of adding another core-only ACP client path.

Security review:

Security review: No patch security review applies to this non-PR feature request.

What I checked:

- **Current ACP agent docs:** The ACP agents page says Agent Client Protocol sessions let OpenClaw run external coding harnesses including Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, OpenClaw ACP, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, and other ACPX harnesses through an ACP backend plugin. Public docs: [`docs/tools/acp-agents.md`](https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/acp-agents). ([`docs/tools/acp-agents.md:13`](https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/acp-agents), [00fc2950d905](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/00fc2950d905))
- **ACP setup and supported targets:** The setup docs list current acpx harness aliases including claude, codex, copilot, cursor, gemini, opencode, kiro, qwen, and others, and document the `acp` config block with backend, defaultAgent, and allowedAgents. Public docs: [`docs/tools/acp-agents-setup.md`](https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/acp-agents-setup). ([`docs/tools/acp-agents-setup.md:28`](https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/acp-agents-setup), [00fc2950d905](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/00fc2950d905))
- **ACP sessions_spawn docs:** The docs explicitly document starting ACP sessions from `sessions_spawn` with `runtime: "acp"`, `agentId`, thread/session mode, and `/acp spawn` alternatives. Public docs: [`docs/tools/acp-agents.md`](https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/acp-agents). ([`docs/tools/acp-agents.md:469`](https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/acp-agents), [00fc2950d905](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/00fc2950d905))
- **ACPX runtime plugin manifest:** The acpx plugin manifest defines plugin id `acpx`, startup activation, enabled-by-default metadata, an ACP runtime description, and config schema for agent command overrides and MCP bridges. ([`extensions/acpx/openclaw.plugin.json:2`](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/blob/00fc2950d905/extensions/acpx/openclaw.plugin.json#L2), [00fc2950d905](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/00fc2950d905))
- **ACPX runtime backend registration:** The acpx service registers the `acpx` ACP runtime backend with the shared ACP runtime registry and reports readiness through the backend health path. ([`extensions/acpx/src/service.ts:543`](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/blob/00fc2950d905/extensions/acpx/src/service.ts#L543), [00fc2950d905](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/00fc2950d905))
- **sessions_spawn implementation:** `createSessionsSpawnTool` advertises ACP only when an ACP backend is available, accepts `runtime: "acp"`, and routes those calls through `spawnAcpDirect`. ([`src/agents/tools/sessions-spawn-tool.ts:264`](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/blob/00fc2950d905/src/agents/tools/sessions-spawn-tool.ts#L264), [00fc2950d905](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/00fc2950d905))

Likely related people:

- **steipete:** Authored the recent merged ACPX timeout/runtime PR touching acpx docs, plugin manifest, runtime tests, and ACP manager tests shortly before this issue, and authored the v2026.5.12 release commit used as shipped provenance. (role: recent ACPX/runtime release contributor; confidence: medium; commits: [0080f3901cfe](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/0080f3901cfef19ff99ff9957799435643c0f01b), [f066dd2f31c2](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/f066dd2f31c231f38fbcaacd6f6dfce0801143b3); files: `docs/tools/acp-agents-setup.md`, `extensions/acpx/openclaw.plugin.json`, `extensions/acpx/src/runtime.ts`)
- **joshavant:** Current ACP docs, runtime-registration lines, and sessions_spawn ACP tests blame to the current-main boundary commit by Josh Avant, making this a good routing signal for the present checked-out implementation. (role: current-main source provenance; confidence: medium; commits: [9a063e38d158](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/9a063e38d158ed7e66d64ffa914b8037a80be804); files: `docs/tools/acp-agents.md`, `extensions/acpx/src/service.ts`, `src/agents/tools/sessions-spawn-tool.test.ts`)
- **91wan:** Merged history for the Codex ACP model/session_spawn integration touched ACP docs, `extensions/acpx/src/runtime.ts`, ACP control-plane code, `src/agents/acp-spawn.ts`, and `src/agents/tools/sessions-spawn-tool.ts`. (role: Codex ACP integration contributor; confidence: medium; commits: [bbfd2c1d1c1c](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/bbfd2c1d1c1c57a3c3ca54d2094ea58a077c5973), [ed1dbcc0ca68](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/ed1dbcc0ca68fcf06b381a491cb80457a0b9e279); files: `docs/tools/acp-agents.md`, `extensions/acpx/src/runtime.ts`, `src/acp/control-plane/manager.core.ts`)
- **joe2643:** Merged ACP build/plugin-tools bridge work touched `docs/cli/acp.md`, `docs/tools/acp-agents.md`, `extensions/acpx/openclaw.plugin.json`, and acpx config/runtime tests. (role: ACPX setup and MCP bridge contributor; confidence: medium; commits: [b228aea91dd9](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/b228aea91dd9ed3454e9465d8527d02bdf31539f), [296fdf33617f](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/296fdf33617f39228c2bb9b28bb30126c2023c5e); files: `docs/cli/acp.md`, `docs/tools/acp-agents.md`, `extensions/acpx/openclaw.plugin.json`)

Codex review notes: model gpt-5.5, reasoning high; reviewed against [00fc2950d905](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/00fc2950d905d5265533393d0af4195713b73ebb); fix evidence: release [v2026.5.12](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/releases/tag/v2026.5.12), commit [f066dd2f31c2](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/f066dd2f31c231f38fbcaacd6f6dfce0801143b3).

</details>

<!-- clawsweeper-review item=83021 -->
